form.formComment: Last start finished 7th in a OPEN on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Hara's Oden beaten 9 lengths (26.04). Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th in a OPEN on April 4 over 457m at Q Lakeside behind Hara's Oden beaten 9 lengths (26.04). Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked at winning post on the first occasion and lost ground.

form.formComment: Strong performance to score by a neck in a Restricted WIN last start at Capalaba, clocking a solid 19.84 over the 366m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to score by a neck in a Restricted WIN last start at Capalaba, clocking a solid 19.84 over the 366m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (25.39) when fourth over 450m at Grafton in a Grade 4/5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (25.39) when fourth over 450m at Grafton in a Grade 4/5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and five minors. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (30.08) at this track in a Grade 5. Has first look at box 4 this time. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (30.08) at this track in a Grade 5. Has first look at box 4 this time. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Q Lakeside then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (30.09) at this track. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at Q Lakeside then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (30.09) at this track. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: The muzzle was dislodged in the boxes just prior to the start event.
Checked shortly after the start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Capalaba to win by a nose in 19.75, beating Another Idea. Last start finished 4th over 366m at Capalaba beaten 2.5 lengths (19.85) behind Highway Princess in a Grade 5 on April 5. Has claims on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Capalaba to win by a nose in 19.75, beating Another Idea. Last start finished 4th over 366m at Capalaba beaten 2.5 lengths (19.85) behind Highway Princess in a Grade 5 on April 5. Has claims on best form.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Q Lakeside over 457m in 25.63. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 457m at Q Lakeside at OPEN level. Not suited by wide draw, needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at Q Lakeside over 457m in 25.63. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 457m at Q Lakeside at OPEN level. Not suited by wide draw, needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at this track. Hard to have this time.
